title: 12L Cool Bag Grey Morocco
features: Insulated foil inner to keep all your picnic, drinks and snacks cooler for longer
Tough fabric exterior and fabric carrying handles.
Use cool packs for added cooling
description: Grey Moroccan design Beach Cooler Bag. Insulated foil inner to keep all your picnic, drinks and snacks cooler for longer. Tough fabric exterior and fabric carrying handles. Zip fastening. Use cool packs for added cooling. 26cm x 17cm x 27cm approx. 12 Litre capacity.
